question: What pricing plans does CloudDesk offer?
answer: CloudDesk offers three plans: Free (up to 3 projects, 5 team members), Pro ($12/user/month with unlimited projects, 50GB storage, priority support), and Enterprise (custom pricing with SSO, advanced analytics, dedicated account manager, and 99.9% SLA). All paid plans include a 14-day free trial.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your registered email. You'll receive a reset link valid for 24 hours. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder. For security, you cannot reuse your last 5 passwords. If you still have trouble, contact support@clouddesk.com.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. You'll need to confirm by typing 'DELETE' and entering your password. Account deletion is permanent and removes all your data within 30 days. If you're the only admin of a workspace, you must transfer ownership first. Download your data export before deleting.

question: What integrations does CloudDesk support?
answer: CloudDesk integrates with 50+ tools including Slack, Microsoft Teams, GitHub, GitLab, Jira, Google Drive, Dropbox, Figma, Zoom, and Zapier. Pro and Enterprise plans also support custom webhooks and our REST API for building your own integrations. Visit our integrations marketplace at clouddesk.com/integrations.

question: How does file sharing work in CloudDesk?
answer: You can share files by dragging them into any project, task, or chat. Free plans support files up to 25MB each with 1GB total storage. Pro plans allow files up to 500MB with 50GB total storage. Supported formats include documents, images, videos, and archives. Files can be previewed in-app and have version history on Pro and Enterprise plans.

question: How do I invite team members to my workspace?
answer: Go to Settings > Team > Invite Members. Enter email addresses (comma-separated for bulk invites) and select a role: Admin, Member, or Guest. Members get full access to assigned projects, Guests can only view and comment. Invites expire after 7 days. Free plans allow up to 5 members, Pro plans are unlimited.

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for new subscriptions. If you're not satisfied, contact support@clouddesk.com within 30 days of your first payment. Refunds for annual plans are prorated based on remaining months. Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-10 business days.

question: How do I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Upgrades take effect immediately, and you'll be charged a prorated amount for the remaining billing period. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing cycle. When downgrading, make sure your usage fits within the new plan limits to avoid data loss.

question: What payment methods are accepted?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit/debit cards. Annual plans can also be paid via bank transfer or wire. Enterprise customers can arrange purchase orders and invoicing. All payments are processed securely through Stripe. Prices are in USD, and local taxes may apply.

question: Which browsers are supported?
answer: CloudDesk supports the latest two versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Microsoft Edge. We recommend Chrome for the best experience. Internet Explorer is not supported. JavaScript and cookies must be enabled. For optimal performance, we recommend at least 4GB of RAM and a stable internet connection.

question: Is there a mobile app?
answer: Yes! CloudDesk has native mobile apps for iOS (requires iOS 15+) and Android (requires Android 10+). Download from the App Store or Google Play. The mobile app supports task management, team chat, notifications, and file viewing. Some advanced features like Gantt charts and custom dashboards are only available on desktop.

question: Does CloudDesk have an API?
answer: Yes, CloudDesk offers a RESTful API available on Pro and Enterprise plans. The API supports full CRUD operations for projects, tasks, comments, and users. Authentication is via API keys or OAuth 2.0. Rate limits are 100 requests/minute for Pro and 1000 requests/minute for Enterprise. Full documentation is at docs.clouddesk.com/api.

question: How do I get started with CloudDesk?
answer: Sign up at clouddesk.com with your email or Google/GitHub account. After sign-up, follow our interactive onboarding guide to create your first project and invite your team. We recommend starting with a template from our gallery. Check out our Getting Started guide at docs.clouddesk.com/getting-started and our YouTube tutorial series for video walkthroughs.

question: How does CloudDesk handle data security?
answer: CloudDesk uses AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. Data is stored in AWS data centers with daily backups retained for 30 days (90 days on Enterprise). We support two-factor authentication and SSO via SAML 2.0 on Enterprise plans.

question: Can I export my data from CloudDesk?
answer: Yes, you can export your data at any time from Settings > Account > Export Data. Exports include projects, tasks, comments, and attachments in JSON or CSV format. File attachments are exported as a ZIP archive. Exports typically complete within a few minutes and you'll receive an email with a download link valid for 7 days.
